problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bacteriophage. Bacteriophage surface display for targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
